/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/t2m_infer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/t2m_infer.dir/cpp/t2m_infer.cpp.o -o t2m_infer  -Wl,-rpath,/inspire/hdd/project/advanced-machine-learning/shixiaoxin-253107030017/global_user/sxx/SimpleT2M_Mac_Release/third_party/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.18.1/lib: /inspire/hdd/project/advanced-machine-learning/shixiaoxin-253107030017/global_user/sxx/SimpleT2M_Mac_Release/third_party/onnxruntime-linux-x64-1.18.1/lib/libonnxruntime.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
